requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest full-leg waxing service lasting at least 45 minutes for next Wednesday at 2:30 PM
requirements.task_description: Find full-leg waxing services, filter to show only options with a duration of 45 minutes or longer, sort by price, and book the cheapest one available for next Wednesday at 2:30 PM.

requirements.task_name: Create a custom 90-minute waxing appointment under $150 by combining multiple areas
requirements.task_description: Build a combined waxing appointment by selecting multiple individual waxing services so that the total duration is between 80 and 100 minutes and the total price stays under $150, then proceed to the booking summary.

requirements.task_name: Select a waxing package that includes Brazilian and underarm waxing for under $120
requirements.task_description: Compare waxing packages to find one that includes both Brazilian and underarm waxing, costs less than $120, and has a total duration of 60 minutes or more, then add it to booking.

requirements.task_name: Schedule three monthly Saturday eyebrow waxing appointments between 9–11 AM with the same technician
requirements.task_description: Set up recurring eyebrow waxing appointments by booking three separate sessions on Saturdays within the next three months, each between 9:00–11:00 AM, with the same preferred technician selected each time.

requirements.task_name: Book same-day men’s chest and back waxing after 5:00 PM
requirements.task_description: Find men’s waxing services and create a combined appointment for chest and back waxing on the earliest available time today after 5:00 PM, then proceed to the booking summary.

requirements.task_name: Add two waxing aftercare products under $30 with 4+ stars and in-store pickup
requirements.task_description: Navigate to the aftercare products section, filter for waxing aftercare items under $30 that have a rating of at least 4 stars and are available for free in-store pickup, then add two different qualifying products (quantity 1 each) to the cart.

requirements.task_name: $100 waxing-only gift card with scheduled email delivery
requirements.task_description: Find a gift card option restricted to waxing services, set the amount to $100, choose a scheduled delivery for a specific future date, and proceed to the checkout page without completing payment.

requirements.task_name: Apply a 10% off waxing package promo code to a package over $100
requirements.task_description: Find a special offer that provides 10% off any waxing package over $100, select an eligible package priced above $100, apply the promo code at checkout, and reach the order review page.
